name: ArtemisSurfaceCommunicationsActivation
title: Artemis Surface Communications Activation
publisher: OpenAI Draft for Aerospace Medicine IG
description: Plan for establishing and verifying communications support for Artemis surface operations.
purpose: Provide a modest, linkable operational plan for communications-related activities without assuming a fixed architecture.

action.title: Verify communications link
action.description: Verify an available communications pathway for planned surface operations.

action.title: Verify navigation signal
action.description: Verify availability of navigation or timing signal support.

action.title: Assign crew
action.description: Assign crew or operators for communications-supported activities.

name: ArtemisRoverTraversePreparation
title: Artemis Rover Traverse Preparation
publisher: OpenAI Draft for Aerospace Medicine IG
description: Plan for preparing a rover traverse in support of Artemis surface activities.
purpose: Create reusable graph edges across rover, crew, and communications functions.

action.title: Verify rover readiness
action.description: Verify rover systems, mission configuration, and readiness state.

action.title: Verify communications link
action.description: Verify communications support for rover traverse.

action.title: Verify navigation signal
action.description: Verify navigation or timing support for rover traverse.

action.title: Assign crew
action.description: Assign crew or operators for rover activity.

action.title: Record crew status
action.description: Capture crew status associated with planned traverse.

name: ArtemisISRUProductionCycle
title: Artemis ISRU Production Cycle
publisher: OpenAI Draft for Aerospace Medicine IG
description: Plan for initiating and monitoring an Artemis in-situ resource utilization production cycle.
purpose: Provide graph-bearing operational facts for ISRU activities while deferring downstream assumptions about usage.

action.title: Verify storage capacity
action.description: Verify capacity for output or intermediate storage.

action.title: Monitor resource output
action.description: Record output from resource production or processing activity.

action.title: Assign destination
action.description: Assign destination for produced resource, equipment, or reserve.

name: ArtemisCargoReceiptWorkflow
title: Artemis Cargo Receipt Workflow
publisher: OpenAI Draft for Aerospace Medicine IG
description: Plan for receiving and routing cargo delivered to Artemis surface operations.
purpose: Seed graph structure across logistics, locations, assets, and later clinical supply relationships.

action.title: Receive cargo
action.description: Receive cargo into local custody.

action.title: Verify manifest
action.description: Verify contents against expected manifest.

action.title: Verify storage capacity
action.description: Verify available storage capacity for received items.

action.title: Assign destination
action.description: Assign destination for storage or onward delivery.

name: ArtemisRadiationShelterActivation
title: Artemis Radiation Shelter Activation
publisher: OpenAI Draft for Aerospace Medicine IG
description: Plan for responding to elevated radiation conditions during Artemis operations.
purpose: Bridge operational infrastructure with radiation tracking and crew status artifacts.

action.title: Record radiation measurement
action.description: Capture radiation measurement relevant to operations or crew safety.

action.title: Notify crew
action.description: Notify personnel of elevated radiation condition or required response.

action.title: Relocate personnel
action.description: Relocate personnel to shelter or other designated location.

action.title: Record crew status
action.description: Capture crew status during or after shelter activation.

name: ArtemisEVAPostActivityRecovery
title: Artemis EVA Post-Activity Recovery
publisher: OpenAI Draft for Aerospace Medicine IG
description: Plan for recording key operational and crew status information following an EVA or comparable activity.
purpose: Create conservative graph edges between crew, suit telemetry, and recovery-related observations without assuming a fixed medical facility.

action.title: Record suit telemetry review
action.description: Review and record relevant telemetry from suit systems or associated equipment.

action.title: Record crew status
action.description: Capture post-activity crew status.

action.title: Record radiation measurement
action.description: Capture any relevant post-activity radiation measurement.
